## Task ID

Issue or task number this PR completes.

## AI Worker

Example: `ai-backend-01`

## AI Role

Example: `backend-engineer`

## Managed By

Example: `ai-project-manager`

## Summary

Brief description of the change and the intended outcome.

## Files Changed

- Major file or area 1
- Major file or area 2

## Verification

- [ ] Lint
- [ ] Typecheck
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Smoke check

Detail any commands or evidence that matters.

## Risks

Known limitations, deferred work, or uncertainty.

## Next Handoff

Which logical AI role should handle the next step?

## Board Update

What GitHub Project status should this move to?

## Commit Trailer Reminder

Use commit trailers like:

```text
AI-Worker: ai-backend-01
AI-Role: backend-engineer
Managed-By: ai-project-manager
Task-ID: 123
```
